text.title: Backup Implementation Patterns
text.summary: Concrete implementation patterns for PostgreSQL PITR, Restic, Velero, and automated verification.

rule.statement: Configure WAL archiving in addition to base backups to enable point-in-time recovery; base backups alone only restore to backup completion time.
rule.rationale: A database corrupted at 14:30 with a base backup from 02:00 and 12 hours of WAL archives can be restored to 14:29 — 1 minute of data loss. Without WAL, the loss is 12.5 hours.

example.code:
# postgresql.conf settings for WAL archiving archive_mode = on archive_command = 'aws s3 cp %p s3://backup-bucket/wal/%f' archive_timeout = 300 # archive WAL at most every 5 minutes
# Base backup (streaming WAL during backup) pg_basebackup \ -h localhost -U replication \ -D /backup/base_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S) \ -Ft -z -P -X stream --checkpoint=fast

rule.statement: Always run restic check after backup to verify repository integrity; silent corruption is the failure mode Restic is designed to detect.
rule.rationale: Restic uses content-addressed storage with SHA-256 hashes. check verifies all data blobs are present and uncorrupted. Omitting it defeats the integrity guarantee.

example.code:
export RESTIC_REPOSITORY="s3:s3.amazonaws.com/backup-bucket/restic" export RESTIC_PASSWORD_FILE="/etc/restic/password"
restic backup /var/www /etc /home \ --exclude="*.log" --exclude="node_modules" \ --tag production --tag "$(hostname)"
restic forget \ --keep-daily 7 --keep-weekly 4 --keep-monthly 12 \ --prune
restic check # mandatory — verify integrity

section.title: Velero Kubernetes Backup

rule.statement: Use defaultVolumesToFsBackup: true in Velero schedules for PVCs without snapshot support; use volume snapshots for supported storage classes.
rule.rationale: File system backup (Restic/Kopia) works on any PVC but is slower. Volume snapshots are faster but require CSI driver support. Omitting both means PVC data is not backed up.

example.code: apiVersion: velero.io/v1 kind: Schedule metadata: name: daily-backup namespace: velero spec: schedule: "0 2 * * *" template: includedNamespaces: [production, staging] excludedResources: [events, events.events.k8s.io] ttl: 720h # 30-day retention snapshotVolumes: true defaultVolumesToFsBackup: true

section.reference: Full Velero schedule with storage location

section.title: Automated Backup Verification

rule.statement: Automate restore verification after every backup job — restore to an isolated environment, check table counts and recent data, push a success metric to Prometheus.
rule.rationale: The 0 in 3-2-1-1-0 is not aspirational — it requires a concrete verification step. Manual restore tests happen rarely or never. Automation makes verification continuous.

rule.statement: Alert when backup age exceeds 1.5x the scheduled interval — a 36-hour-old backup from a daily job indicates missed runs.
rule.rationale: Backup jobs fail silently (exit 0 on partial failure, disk full, network timeout). Age-based alerting catches these without requiring job-level monitoring hooks.

section.reference: Automated PostgreSQL restore verification script with alerting
Prometheus rules for backup age, failure, and size anomaly
